organization.description: COLEGIO OFICIAL DE REGISTRADORES DE LA PROPIEDAD Y MERCANTILES DE ESPAÑA is listed as a Qualified Trust Service Provider (QTSP) on the EU eIDAS Trust List for Spain, providing digital trust services via registradores.org.
